content.en:
Seven thousand three hundred and sixty-two territories.

Terran.

Ye Tian is back.

At the moment, he was very excited.

Ten super-dimensional Chiyuan Pills were in his hands, and with these super-dimensional Chiyuan Pills, he could definitely raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the first realm.

He had already comprehended the rules of the extradimensional dimension, and once his cultivation reached the peak of the first realm, he could immediately impact the second realm.

The second realm of the extradimensional realm is the top existence in the Six Thousand Realm.

"Start a retreat!"

Ye Tian was not worried that the Heaven Survey Realm Snake Clan would be able to deduce from him, and he could cultivate with peace of mind.

On the side of the Sky Survey Realm Snake, he also tried to deduce it, but he never deduced it, and finally gave up.

For them, there was no big loss this time, but the loss of a First Realm clan and the loss of ten Extradimensional Chiyuan Pills was not a loss at all.

It's just that it's undoubtedly a shame to be infiltrated by the enemy, but as long as the news doesn't get out, it doesn't matter.

......

As the super-dimensional Chiyuan Pills were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, his cultivation was also improving rapidly.

A few extradimensional years later.

H-830!!

Ye Tian's cultivation finally broke through again and reached the peak realm of the first realm.

However, he didn't immediately go to the second realm, but was ready to stabilize his cultivation a little more, and then go to the second realm.

In this way, time passed another extradimensional era.

"It's almost, it's time to go to the second realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he urged the extradimensional rules to stimulate the extradimensional body, so that the extradimensional body could complete the second transformation and reach the second realm of the extradimensional body.

And this process will be very long, and it will not be broken through all at once.

If the realm of extra-dimensional rules is low, this transformation process may require hundreds or even thousands of extra-dimensional eras, and if the realm of extra-dimensional rules is high, or there are treasures that assist in breaking through, time can be compressed.

Ye Tian's extra-dimensional rule realm was very high, far exceeding the requirements for breaking through the second realm.

If he comprehends a hundred superdimensional rules, he will be able to break through 100%, and it is conceivable that his current more than 600 superdimensional rules will naturally help him break through quickly.

"In about ten extradimensional eras, the transformation can be completed!" (dbab)

This is Ye Tian's estimate.

During this period of time, Ye Tian refined all kinds of extra-dimensional resources, after all, transformation also requires energy, if he does not refine any energy, the transformation speed will be very slow.

In addition, he is also doing his best to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique, striving to become the third level of the Great Realm Armor Technique as soon as possible.

During this time, he was very low-key, and he did not provoke any forces, let alone explore some dangerous places.

He just waited quietly to cultivate in the human race, for him, the most important thing at the moment was to break through to the second realm, and to practice the third realm of the Great Realm Armor Technique, and everything else could be put aside.

In a flash, ten extradimensional epochs have passed.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian's transcendental body had just completed its transformation, reaching the transcendent body of the second realm, and his cultivation had officially stepped into the second realm.

Although he was only in the early stage of the second realm, his strength was much, much stronger than in the past.

Moreover, after reaching the second realm, his efficiency in comprehending the extradimensional rules increased by at least three times.

This is normal, after all, the higher the cultivation, the easier it is to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

What is surprising is that his cultivation has broken through to the second realm, and it is even easier to cultivate the third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, maybe in two or three extradimensional eras, he will be able to practice the third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique.

When the time comes, even the existence of the Fourth Realm will not want to deduce his traces.

Rumble!!!!!!

A more cumbersome and advanced Boundary Armor Pattern Map appeared on Ye Tian's body, which was the Boundary Armor Pattern Map of the Third Layer Realm, representing Ye Tian's cultivation of the Great Realm Armor Technique to the Third Layer Realm.

At this level, Ye Tian finally breathed a sigh of relief.

At least, there is no need to worry about the extradimensional elves for the time being.

The fourth realm of the super-dimensional elf clan can't deduce his traces, even if it's the fifth realm, it's not necessarily good at deduction techniques, and ordinary deduction techniques can't deduce him, even if he holds the deduction treasure of the level of super-dimensional dao soldiers, he can't deduce his traces. []

It's like a treasure like the real stone of the fog mother, and it can't deduce his traces.

"The entire Heaven Survey Realm Snake Clan is estimated to be able to truly practice the third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he still wanted to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fourth layer realm.

But Ye Tian tried to cultivate, but his progress was extremely slow.

With his current realm, even if he had been cultivating frantically, sacrificing a replica body, and cultivating a thousand extradimensional eras, he would not be able to cultivate to the fourth layer.

"My super-dimensional rule realm is still low, it's already a fluke to be able to practice to the third layer, and then I have to improve the super-dimensional rules as soon as possible!"

His current extra-dimensional rule realm is at a very low level in the second realm, and among those powerhouses at the peak of the second realm, which one's super-dimensional rule realm is not above him?

The 10,000 Extra-Dimensional Rules are one-point extra-dimensional rules, and the one-point extra-dimensional rules are the minimum requirements for impacting the third realm, but this realm is certain to die when it hits the third realm, and only the realm can 100% break through to the third realm.

Under normal circumstances, the realm of extradimensional rules reaches the three-point realm before daring to attack the third realm.

Therefore, there are too many second realms to comprehend the rules of one point of extradimensionality.

He had only comprehended the six hundred silk extradimensional rules, which was simply too weak compared to the second realm where others had comprehended more than ten thousand extradimensional rules.

"In the first realm, my strength can still crush other extradimensional realms, but in the second realm, I am still too weak and have to keep a low profile. "

At the moment, Ye Tian wanted to find a treasure that could assist him in comprehending the rules of the extradimensional dimension, otherwise he would be practicing step by step, and his progress would be too slow.

A force like the Garan Chamber of Commerce will definitely have such a treasure, but he will definitely not be able to get his hands on it.

"However, my cultivation has broken through to the second realm, and I should be qualified to enter the circle of the second realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Only by entering the circle of the second realm can you learn more information.

If you have been in the circle of the first realm, it will never be possible to obtain a big opportunity or more information.

So in the next few days, Ye Tian exposed his cultivation in the second realm, and he was immediately shocked by many people who knew Ye Tian's superdimensional realm.

After all, Ye Tian was too low-key before, and his previous cultivation had not yet reached the peak of the first realm, and he had not exposed the extradimensional rules, so he suddenly broke through to the second realm.
